emails.subject: RE: California - Credit Worthiness requirements
emails.body: RE: California Credit Worthiness requirements Was the amendment approved by FERC? Jim

emails.subject: RE: California - Credit Worthiness requirements
emails.body: Jim, I presume that both filings, the one on third party guarantees, and the one on lower credit ratings, were approved by FERC. Both were approved by the Board and both are in the ISO Tariff, the first is ammendment 36 and the second ammendment 29. I could not find the actual FERC order in the millions of hits in the very imperfect search engine of the CAISO. Please advise. Regards, ALF

emails.subject: RE: California - Credit Worthiness requirements
emails.body: Alberto Pls ask Sue Mara where these stand. I thought that the FERC didn't approve. Jim
